metadata.description: Deploy websites to simple-host.app from your coding agent — static hosting plus a per-site backend (state, collections, private pages, templates).

plugins.name: website-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy static websites to simple-host.app right from your coding agent — inline JSON files or a tar.gz/zip archive. Each site gets a per-site backend: shared JSON state with atomic ops, append-only collections, private (password-locked) pages, drop-in comments/feedback widgets, and starter templates. Bundles a builder skill that helps plan what to build.
